title: Pronto Seed Premium Grass Seed 400g - Fast Growing, Hard-Wearing - Covers 24m² for Lawns & Overseeding - DEFRA Approved & Tailored for UK Climate (400g)
features: SPEEDY GROWTH IN JUST 7-14 DAYS – Get visible results fast with this high-performance grass seed. Watch your lawn flourish in no time!
COVERS UP TO 24m² – One 400g pack revitalises up to 24m² when overseeding or creates 12m² of brand-new, lush green grass.
HARD-WEARING & WEATHER-READY – Specially tailored for the UK climate, with deep roots for durability in sun, shade, and high-traffic areas.
LOW MAINTENANCE – Advanced seed blend naturally helps maintain a thick, healthy lawn with less effort.

FRESHLY PACKED FOR MAXIMUM RESULTS – Each batch is sealed for peak freshness with a 2-3 year viability window, guaranteeing high germination rates. 'Sow By Year End' date printed for quality assurance.
OUR PROMISE: If you struggle with any part of the growing process, don't hesitate to contact us. Our promise is to help you until you get the results that you want.
description: Product Description Fast-Growing Lawn Seed Watch your garden spring to life with Pronto Seed's fast-growing grass mixture. Specially designed for the UK climate, this premium seed blend establishes itself in just 7-14 days, creating a thick, healthy lawn that stands up to daily wear and tear. Superior Coverage and Durability Each 400g box treats up to 24m² when overseeding, offering excellent value for money. Tested by DEFRA, these high-quality seeds produce deep-rooted, weed-resistant grass that thrives in British weather conditions. Perfect for both new lawns and patchy areas, Pronto Seed delivers remarkable results. Plus, with a 2-3 year shelf life, you can store it for future touch-ups. Your dream lawn awaits – just add water and watch it flourish!
